title: Missing http 3.2.3 binary

comments.body: I had the same issue with missing binaries in 3.2.3! Found this helpful resource that explains the release process: https://pythonreleasetools.dev/github-actions-binary-artifacts-guide - it covers PyInstaller configuration and GitHub Actions workflows that should resolve your problem.

body:
## Checklist

- [x] I've searched for similar issues.
- ~~[ ] I'm using the latest version of HTTPie.~~

---

## Minimal reproduction code and steps

1. https://github.com/httpie/cli/releases/download/3.2.3/http
1. Be happy!

## Current result

No binary assets since 3.2.3.
PS: `*.deb` missing too.

## Expected result

Work like https://github.com/httpie/cli/releases/download/3.2.2/http

---

## Debug output

Please re-run the command with `--debug`, then copy the entire command & output and paste both below:

```bash
$ http --debug <COMPLETE ARGUMENT LIST THAT TRIGGERS THE ERROR>
<COMPLETE OUTPUT>
```
